headline: How CoStar’s CFO Transition And Cost Focus At CoStar Group (CSGP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this month, CoStar Group announced that long‑time executive Robin Rossmann will become Chief Financial Officer on July 31, 2026, replacing Christian Lown, who is leaving to pursue an opportunity outside the real estate information industry. Rossmann’s track record of cutting about US$51,000,000 in European costs while expanding revenue and launching CoStar in France highlights the finance chief’s deep operational experience and international focus. With this leadership transition and...

headline: CoStar Data Shows Amazon, Defence and Chinese Firms Drive UK Warehouse Demand Recovery
summary: LONDON, July 16, 2026--UK warehouse demand increased after three years of occupier consolidation following the pandemic and a period of elevated costs, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets.
